chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Misc. Appln. No.S- 492 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 13.01.2021. Mrs. Tasleem Pasha, Advocate for the Applicant. Mr.Umair Khan, advocate for private respondents Mr. Shahzado Saleem Nahiyoon, D.P.G for State. ==== The applicant by way of instant application u/s 491 Cr.P.C has sought for custody of her kid, as he according to her is confined illegally by his father. The custody of the kid with his father could hardly be said to be illegal, which may constitute an act of wrongful confinement. Be that as it may, the kid on having been produced by his father has refused to join the applicant. If, the applicant is having a feeling that the welfare of the kid is lying with her then she has to prove such feeling by filing an application for custody of her kid before Guardian Courts having jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant application being misconceived is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa
